hero.title: Complete phone check before purchase
hero.subtitle: Ensure the authenticity of the device and its technical condition. Get a fast report by IMEI and databases in just a few seconds.

features.title: Why choose us
features.subtitle: Protect yourself from scammers and hidden defects
features.item1_desc: Data is collected from official registries and closed service center databases.
features.item2_desc: The report is generated automatically within a few seconds after the request.
features.item3_desc: A small fee for the check will save you from buying a broken or stolen device.
